# Basic Slack server functionality test

# Set aggressive timeout environment
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1500ms

# Start the Slack server in background
server_command 'go run main.go'

# Wait for server startup
wait 1s

# Test send_message tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test1", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "send_message", "arguments": {"channel": "#general", "text": "Hello World!"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Message sent to #general'
stdout 'Hello World!'
stdout 'Message ID'

# Test list_channels tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test2", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "list_channels", "arguments": {"limit": 5}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Channels'
stdout '#general'
stdout '#random'

# Test get_channel_history tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test3", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "get_channel_history", "arguments": {"channel": "#general", "limit": 3}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Recent messages'
stdout '@alice'
stdout '@bob'

# Test create_channel tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test4", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "create_channel", "arguments": {"name": "test-channel", "is_private": false}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Created public channel'
stdout '#test-channel'
stdout 'Channel ID'

# Test invite_to_channel tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test5", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "invite_to_channel", "arguments": {"channel": "#test-channel", "users": "U123456,U789012"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Invited users'
stdout '#test-channel'
stdout 'U123456,U789012'

# Test get_user_info tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test6", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "get_user_info", "arguments": {"user": "U123456"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'User info'
stdout 'Alice Johnson'
stdout 'alice@company.com'
